title: Baddon Fass
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:BaddonsMacabreRictus-DEII2.jpg]] |name=Baddon Fass |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' [[Invincible (Imperial-class)|''Invincible'']], over [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]][[Dark Empire II 2|''Dark Empire II'' 2]] |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Dark Empire]] **[[Dark Side Elite]] |masters=[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Vader's ''authority'' has passed to ''us'', bounty hunter.|Baddon Fass, to Boba Fett|}} '''Baddon Fass''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] and a member of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Dark Side Elite]]. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], he was dispatched with fellow [[darksider]] [[Zasm Katth]] to the moon of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] on a mission to locate the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] belonging to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] heroes, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. After failing to recruit [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to help them in that task and being unable to kill the Jedi [[Vima-Da-Boda]], who was hiding on the moon, Fass and Katth returned to their the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Imperial-class)|''Invincible'']] in an attempt to intercept the ''Falcon'' as it was leaving Nar Shaddaa. Attempting to catch the ship with a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]], the darksiders set it on full power. However, they instead pulled the massive Traffic Control spire into the Star Destroyer, piercing it through and causing it to crash and be destroyed, killing the Dark Jedi. ==Biography== {{Quote|No—you fool! You've locked onto the guidance tower! You're pulling it out of the ground! DISENGAGE! DISENGAGE—!|Zasm Kath, to Baddon Fass|[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]]}} A [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual, Baddon Fass was a [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]] in service of the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] A veteran darksider of Palpatine's rule,{{CSWECite|I||Fass, Baddon}} and one of his most valued servants,[[Dark Empire II 3|''Dark Empire II'' 3]] Fass was admitted into the ranks of the [[Dark Side Elite]], a selected cadre of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] created upon[[Dark Empire II 1|''Dark Empire II'' 1]] Palpatine's return in a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] body.[[Dark Empire 2|''Dark Empire'' 2]] When the Emperor was defeated again,[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]] and the Empire waited for his return, the leader of the Dark Side Elite, [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Sedriss QL]] assumed command of the Imperial forces, launching [[Operation Shadow Hand]]. As part of that operation, Fass and fellow darksider [[Zasm Katth]] were dispatched in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] to the moon [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] with the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Imperial-class)|''Invincible'']] on a multiple-objective mission. They were ordered to make contact with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to recruit him on a search for the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of famed [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] heroes, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. Fass and Katth were also required to report on any sightings of the ''Falcon'' to Sedriss and were ordered to eliminate the Jedi woman [[Vima-Da-Boda]].{{CSWECite|II|204|Katth, Zasm}} While they were stationed aboard the ''Invincible'', Fass and Katth witnessed the ''Falcon'' arriving on the moon. They attempted to lock onto it with a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]], but the vessel slipped away and took hiding in the mazelike alleys of the [[Duros Sector]]. The darksiders then proceeded with the original plan of recruiting Fett. The two confronted the bounty hunter, demanding him to provide his services for free. When the bounty hunter refused, Fass strangled him with a Force choke and threatened to reveal secret information about him. When the darksiders attempted to remove Fett's helmet, he blasted them away with wrist-mounted rockets, almost killing Fass, before retreating aboard his ship, the [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']]. However, [[Darktrooper team two|Dark trooper team two]] reported that they had spotted the ''Falcon'' parked inside the workshop of mechanic [[Shug Ninx]]. [[File:Katth_and_Fass_on_the_bridge.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Fass and Katth on the bridge of the ''Invincible'']] Fass and Katth proceeded toward the workshop, but their Force sense notified them about the presence of Vima-Da-Boda nearby. Remembering their orders to take out the woman, Fass ordered the dark trooper [[Grath (dark trooper)|Grath]] to open fire on innocent bystanders with a [[turbocannon]] in hopes of killing the Jedi hiding among them. The elderly Jedi, however, managed to evade capture and was rescued by the Solos, who had also taken out dark trooper team two in the hangar. Arriving inside the hangar, Fass and Katth retrieved the bodies of their fallen troops and left a detachment of stormtroopers aboard the ship, before returning to the ''Invincible''. However, the Solos returned to the ''Falcon'' with Vima-Da-Boda and took out the stormtroopers, taking the ship to escape from the moon. They were detected by [[Mako Spince]], the overseer of the Traffic Control Spire and Solo's rival. Spince told Fass and Katth about the ''Falcon''{{'s}} location. Hoping to capture the ship, Katth ordered to activate the Star Destroyer's tractor beam on full power, although Fass advised his companion against doing so. Solo maneuvered the ''Falcon'' under the Traffic Control Spire, which was caught in the tractor beam instead, was ripped from the ground and flew toward the ''Invincible''. Realizing the danger, Katth ordered Fass to deactivate the tractor beam, but it was too late. The spire pierced the Star Destroyer's engineering section, disabling its thrusters and making the ship fall into the surface of the planet, destroying both Fass and Katth and their crew. Palpatine meanwhile was reborn in another clone body, and the news of the death of his two best darksiders was not taken lightly by the Emperor, although he did find replacements for them soon thereafter.[[Dark Empire II 6|''Dark Empire II'' 6]] ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Millennium Falcon on screens, Katth. They are almost in tractor range.''"
"''Excellent. In moments, they'll be safely aboard our ship.''"
"''And then we go after Boba Fett!''"
"''Patience, Baddon, patience.''"
"''That bounty hunter almost killed me!|Fass and Katth, as they spot the ''Falcon''|}} [[File:Fass_chokes_Fett.jpg|thumb|180px|Fass punishes Fett for his insolence.]] Fass was an adept of the dark side, who did not stop at anything to achieve his objective. He did not care for the innocent bystanders on Nar Shaddaa, giving an order to open fire at the crowd in order to kill Vima-Da-Boda. He took Fett's attack on him as a personal insult and was determined to get even with the bounty hunter, but was unable to do so. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|''KAK''…should have guessed…''dark side'' power—|Boba Fett, being Force-choked by Baddon Fass|}} Fass was able to Force-choke, using it on Fett. He was able to sense the presence of Vima-Da-Boda on Nar Shaddaa. ==Appearances== *[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]] *[[Dark Empire II 2|''Dark Empire II'' 2]] {{1st}} *[[Dark Empire II 3|''Dark Empire II'' 3]] {{Mo}} *[[Dark Empire II 4|''Dark Empire II'' 4]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{CollectorCite|4|ComicScan|ComicScan: Comics That Almost Were}} *[[Star Wars Handbook 3: Dark Empire|''Star Wars Handbook'' 3: ''Dark Empire'']] *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{FactFile|82|PAL 1-4|Resurrection of Palpatine}} *{{FactFile|85|SED 1-4|Exekutor Sedress (German Edition)}} {{Imo}} *{{FactFile|97|FET 29-32|Boba Fett}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ===Cut appearances=== *[[Lightsider (story)|''Lightsider'']] {{C|Unpublished}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Fass, Baddon}} [[Category:Dark Side Elite]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Males]]
